apps.name: Neo-Kyoto Core
apps.shortDescription: Modular urban framework for Unreal Engine 5 with 4K textures.
apps.fullDescription: Neo-Kyoto Core is a revolutionary environment toolkit designed to bridge the gap between architectural visualization and game-ready cyberpunk environments. Developed over 18 months by the Catvers Studio team, this application provides artists with a 'Glassmorphic' workflow for creating complex urban landscapes.

features.title: Dynamic Weather
features.description: Real-time rain, fog, and lightning systems optimized for cyberpunk aesthetics and Ray-Tracing.

features.title: Modular Assets
features.description: Over 500+ high-fidelity assets ready to snap-grid for rapid level design and world-building.

features.title: Lumen Lighting
features.description: Pre-configured global illumination settings that respond instantly to time-of-day changes.

features.title: Optimized Mesh
features.description: Proprietary LOD systems ensure high frame rates even on mid-range hardware like RTX 30-series.

apps.seoDescription: Download Neo-Kyoto Core, the ultimate cyberpunk environment toolkit for Unreal Engine 5.
